preFixReproduction.observed: The full People thread had only Back to chat inbox and no direct product-level Mool-home control.

rootCause: The full-screen composer designs on Screens 24 and 25 omitted the persistent Mool destination already provided by the Chat Inbox and Order/Support thread.
resolution: Add a labelled Mool control as the first persistent composer action on People and Business threads, routing directly to Screen 04 without removing any existing chat control.
